title: Count MongoDB Search Results
description:
The MongoDB Search count option adds a field to the metadata results document that displays a count of the search
results for the query. You can use count to determine the size of
the result set. You can use it in the $search
or $searchMeta stage. You must use it in conjunction with
the MongoDB Search operators or collectors to display either the total number of documents or a
lower bound on the number of documents that match the query.
